prompts: Use PR Completion to validate and commit my task-related changes, push them, and shepherd the current pull request until its current head is verified merge-ready. Do not merge or enable auto-merge.
Use PR Completion to find changes owned by this parent repository and its submodules, run each repository's required checks, and create scoped commits without staging unrelated work.
Use PR Completion to diagnose the failed checks on this pull request, fix only branch-caused failures, validate the repair, push it, and resume watching the new head.
Use PR Completion to triage every unresolved review thread against the current code, fix real findings, explain stale or false-positive findings with evidence, and return the PR to merge readiness.
Use PR Completion to resolve the upstream conflicts on this pull-request branch without rewriting history or force-pushing, validate the combined behavior, and resume the merge-readiness watcher.
